titleZh: 司法解释征求意见稿（公司法）公开稿（第一部分）
titleEn: Draft Judicial Interpretation of the PRC Company Law Released for Public Comment (Part I)
abstractZh: 围绕公开征求意见稿，重点梳理公司法解释路径中的治理边界、权利救济与程序义务，为企业修订章程提供对照框架。
abstractEn: Reviews practical implications from the draft judicial interpretation process, focusing on governance boundaries, shareholder remedies, and procedural compliance.
